conflicts.description: Exclusive catering clause conflicts with external food truck request
conflicts.suggested_action: Review catering exclusivity against planned food truck area

conflicts.description: AV equipment list due before headcount finalized -- AV needs may change based on attendance
conflicts.suggested_action: Coordinate AV and catering deadlines to ensure consistent planning assumptions

gaps.description: No contract covers overnight security for load-in day (Sep 3)
gaps.suggested_action: Confirm security coverage for overnight period Sep 3-4

gaps.description: No contract addresses emergency medical services during event days
gaps.suggested_action: Secure EMS provider contract for September 4-6 event period

risks.description: Catering cost estimate ($45/person x 500) exceeds allocated budget line
risks.suggested_action: Review catering budget allocation against projected headcount

risks.description: Insurance certificates due June 1 but security vendor onboarding may not start until May
risks.suggested_action: Begin security vendor onboarding process by April to meet June 1 insurance deadline
